Welcome
June 20, 2026

We are so excited to celebrate this special season with the people we love most. This page includes everything you need — event details, travel guidance, RSVP, and more. We cannot wait to celebrate with you.

until we say "I do"
Our Story
How it began
We met as physiotherapy interns on the same clinical rotation, and what started as friendship grew into something deeper. In time, we fell in love.

We've been best friends ever since — growing together and building a relationship rooted in trust, laughter, and faith. We chose forever together, and now we're excited to begin this next chapter.
Jamiel & Annia
"It begins with us — and it wouldn't be complete without you."

Adults Only

Terrain
Mixed Terrain
We recommend choosing footwear with comfort in mind
Dress Code
Formal Attire — Pastel & Soft Neutral Tones
We invite guests to dress in formal attire in pastel and soft neutral tones. The venue includes mixed terrain — please choose footwear with comfort in mind.

Kindly reserve white, ivory, and all bridal shades for the bride. Thank you for your thoughtfulness.
Travel & Stay
Where to Stay
The venue is in the Reading / Montego Bay area. We recommend the following accommodations.
Nearby Hotels
Toby's Resort
Approximately 20–25 minutes from the venue
Breathless Montego Bay Resort & Spa
Approximately 10–15 minutes from the venue
Secrets St. James Montego Bay
Approximately 10–15 minutes from the venue
Villas & Airbnb
Ideal for families or groups travelling together. We recommend looking in:
ReadingFreeport BogueFairview Montego Bay
Guests are responsible for arranging their own accommodations. We recommend booking early and confirming travel time to the venue before finalising your stay.
